title: Telling Time
subject: Mathematics
description: Learn to tell time on analog and digital clocks
nscObjectives: Tell time to the hour and half hour
Tell time to quarter past and quarter to

sections.name: Time to the Hour
sections.instruction: When the minute hand points to 12, we say 'o'clock'. Look at where the hour hand points!

questions.prompt: What time does this clock show?
questions.hint: The short hand (hour hand) points to 3.

questions.prompt: What time is shown on the clock?
questions.hint: Look at where the short hand is pointing.

questions.prompt: What time does this clock show?
questions.hint: The minute hand is at 12, so it's exactly on the hour.

questions.prompt: What time is it?
questions.hint: Both hands are pointing to 12!

questions.prompt: Morgan wakes up at 7 o'clock in the morning. Where does the hour hand point?
questions.hint: At 7 o'clock, the hour hand points to 7.

sections.name: Time to the Half Hour
sections.instruction: When the minute hand points to 6, it's 'half past' the hour. The hour hand will be between two numbers.

questions.prompt: What time does this clock show?
questions.hint: The minute hand is at 6 (half past), and the hour hand is between 2 and 3.

questions.prompt: What time is shown?
questions.hint: The minute hand points to 6, so it's half past.

questions.prompt: What time does this clock show?
questions.hint: Half past means 30 minutes after the hour.

questions.prompt: Another way to say 'half past 6' is:
questions.hint: Half past means 30 minutes, so 6:30.

questions.prompt: School starts at half past 8. What time is that?
questions.hint: Half past = 30 minutes after the hour.

sections.name: Quarter Past and Quarter To
sections.instruction: Quarter past = 15 minutes after. Quarter to = 15 minutes before the next hour.

questions.prompt: What time does this clock show?
questions.hint: The minute hand is at 3 (15 minutes), so it's quarter past.

questions.prompt: What time is shown?
questions.hint: The minute hand is at 9 (45 minutes), which is quarter to the next hour.

questions.prompt: What time does this clock show?
questions.hint: Minute hand at 3 = 15 minutes = quarter past.

questions.prompt: Quarter past 3 is the same as:
questions.hint: Quarter = 15 minutes.

questions.prompt: Quarter to 6 is the same as:
questions.hint: Quarter to 6 means 15 minutes before 6 o'clock.

sections.name: AM and PM
sections.instruction: AM is from midnight to noon (morning). PM is from noon to midnight (afternoon and night).

questions.prompt: Morgan eats breakfast at 7:00 in the morning. Is this AM or PM?
questions.hint: Morning time is AM.

questions.prompt: School ends at 3:00 in the afternoon. Is this AM or PM?
questions.hint: Afternoon time is PM.

questions.prompt: Morgan goes to bed at 8:00 at night. Is this AM or PM?
questions.hint: Night time is PM.

questions.prompt: Which activity happens in the AM?
questions.hint: AM is morning time.

questions.prompt: Select ALL the times that are PM:
questions.hint: PM times have 'PM' after them!

sections.name: Time Word Problems
sections.instruction: Use what you know about time to solve these problems!

questions.prompt: The movie starts at 2 o'clock and ends at 4 o'clock. How long is the movie?
questions.hint: Count from 2 to 4: 2 → 3 → 4 = 2 hours

questions.prompt: Morgan started her homework at 4:00 PM. She finished at 5:00 PM. How long did she work?
questions.hint: From 4:00 to 5:00 is 1 hour.

questions.prompt: It is 3:00 now. What time will it be in 2 hours?
It is 10:00 AM now. What time was it 3 hours ago?
questions.hint: 10 - 3 = 7, so it was 7:00 AM.

questions.prompt: Lunch is at 12:00. It is now 11:30. How long until lunch?
questions.hint: From 11:30 to 12:00 is half an hour.
